name: Hot Orchard Peach Cup
recipeIngredient: 40 oz (1 bottle) Dole Pure & Light Orchard Peach Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the juice, brown sugar, cinnamon sticks, and butter/margarine in a Dutch oven or covered saucepan. Heat to a boil.
2. Remove from heat. Discard the cinnamon sticks. Add the schnapps (if desired). Garnish with a peach slice and cinnamon stick. Serve.
Calories: 181
Cholesterol: 0mg
Fat: 4g
Sodium: 70mg
